description: Classic image-grid CAPTCHA generated from procedural object silhouettes and per-tile modifier stacks. Modifiers include rotation, mirroring, crop, split panels, occlusion bands, fog, inversion, jitter shadows, fake loading bars, and tile offsets.
challenge_randomization: The server regenerates the current challenge on each /state request and after failed submissions. Explicit seeds remain only as a developer debugging hook.
notes: Ground truth records the target object category, accepted tile ids, and per-tile modifier stack for audit.
